name: OpenCord Plugin Library
description: A source-based, opt-in OpenCord userplugin library. Users choose exactly which plugins are copied into src/userplugins before rebuilding OpenCord.

plugins.name: QuickTemplates
plugins.description: Local support/chat templates. Type ;;hello or use /qt to preview templates.

plugins.name: LinkSafety
plugins.description: Blocks obvious phishing-style links before they are sent. No external requests.

plugins.name: TranslatorPro
plugins.description: Extended translation with Google, DeepL, DeepSeek, backup engine, and auto-translate options.

plugins.name: LocalChatExporter
plugins.description: Token-free local export of currently cached channel messages as JSON or Markdown.
plugins.privacy: Exports only messages already loaded in the current Discord client. It never reads or stores an account token.

plugins.name: ChatStats
plugins.description: Local statistics for currently loaded channel or DM messages.
plugins.privacy: Analyzes only messages already loaded in the current Discord client.

plugins.name: LocalSearch
plugins.description: Searches currently loaded messages locally and exports matching results.
plugins.privacy: Searches only the local in-memory message cache.

plugins.name: LinkCollector
plugins.description: Exports links from currently loaded messages as JSON, CSV, or Markdown.
plugins.privacy: Exports only links already visible in loaded local messages.

plugins.name: AttachmentIndex
plugins.description: Exports attachment metadata from currently loaded messages.
plugins.privacy: Exports only attachment metadata already present in loaded local messages.

plugins.name: PrivacyScan
plugins.description: Locally scans loaded messages for sensitive-data patterns with redacted output.
plugins.privacy: Scans locally and redacts samples; no network requests or raw secret export.

plugins.name: LastSeenTracker
plugins.description: Tracks locally observed online/offline transitions and shows last-seen info.

plugins.name: SilentEdit
plugins.description: Advanced opt-in plugin that resends/deletes messages to avoid the edited tag.
plugins.warning: Can confuse moderation/logging expectations. Use only where allowed.

plugins.name: SilentDelete
plugins.warning: Can confuse moderation/logging expectations. Use only where allowed.
